utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Each section is fully specified with details. The 'property' section includes location, type, size, features, price, and move-in date. The 'financing' section includes method, down payment, interest rate, term, payment estimate, and documentation. The 'legal_services' section includes service type, cost, and included services. The 'moving_services' section includes service level, cost, included services, and timeline. The 'setup_services' section includes package name, cost, and included services. The 'total_budget' section includes detailed cost breakdown and totals. Therefore, all 6 items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a property in Liberty Village, Toronto, described as a 1-bedroom condo with modern smart home features for CAD $485,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match is the 'New Build' (price CAD $480K, smart home, eco-friendly, within budget), which has a rating of 10. The financing solution uses a standard mortgage with 10% down payment and 5.25% interest, which corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' type from ground truth (rating 8) rather than the 'First-Time Buyer' scheme (rating 10), since the assistant didn't explicitly specify any first-time buyer program. The legal service chosen is 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 8). The moving service is described as 'Standard/Premium moving service' at CAD $1,200, matching the 'Premium Moving' entry (rating 7). The utility setup is 'Premium utility setup package' (rating 9). The assistant also included a 'Full Structural Survey' (CAD $650), which has a rating of 8.
